note: HOT-FIX selector overrides. This is the source of truth; it is published to the public config endpoint (see docs/DEPLOYMENT.md). When a platform changes its site, edit that platform's selectors here, publish, and every installed extension picks it up within minutes — NO Chrome/Edge store review. Merged OVER the bundled config/selectors.js (remote wins per field). Only existing platform ids are honored (new platforms need a code release).
